base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of locations_overworld — a tile from 1996 super mario rpg. Mushroom Kingdom + Rose Town + Moleville + Land's End + Monstro Town + Nimbus Land + Barrel Volcano + Factory. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Mushroom Kingdom + Rose Town + Moleville + Land's End + Monstro Town + Nimbus Land + Barrel Volcano + Factory
